---
title: "Data Exploration"
subtitle: "Flight Delays & Housing Data"
---

# Flight Delays
## Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
Calculated the proportion of delays caused by weather, carriers, and security. Identified the worst airports for weather delays and determined the best month to fly to avoid delays overall.

# Housing Data
## Feature Engineering & Interpretation
Extracted feature importances to determine the strongest predictors of a home's age (living area, 1-story architectural style, and number of bathrooms). Plotted these relationships using boxplots and scatter plots.
